---
title: "CoordinateSpace"
generated: true
description: "Relation between the parameter transform and the two voxel grids."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._space`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CoordinateSpace -->
```python
class CoordinateSpace(Protocol)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:CoordinateSpace -->
Relation between the parameter transform and the two voxel grids.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CoordinateSpace.sampler -->
```python
sampler(*, ndim: int, full_fixed_shape: tuple[int, ...], full_moving_shape: tuple[int, ...], dtype: jnp.dtype) -> _Sampler
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Bind the space to one registration's full-resolution shapes.
